title: Coordinates, Graphs, Functions, and Rates of Change
description: Model water use, travel, cost, and capacity from tables, graphs, formulas, and descriptions. Learners cumulatively produce a multi-representation resource dashboard through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Plot and interpret ordered pairs with axis quantities, units, origin, and scale.
Determine whether a relationship is a function and define practical input and output domains.
Translate a relationship among words, tables, graphs, and formulas while preserving meaning.
